hero.subtitle: Empower your business with a custom, multilingual, AI-powered website. Built for shopkeepers & wholesalers who want to stand out in the digital age.

affordable.title: Affordable Pricing

howItWorks.title: Four Simple
howItWorks.subtitle: From zero to a live website in under 24 hours.

step1.title: Tell Us About Your Shop
step1.desc: Fill in your business name, location, and what you sell.

step2.title: Pick a Template

step3.title: AI Generates Content
step3.desc: Our AI writes product descriptions and optimizes your SEO.

step4.title: Review & Launch
step4.desc: Preview your site, make changes, and go live!

testimonials.title: Loved by
testimonials.subtitle: Join hundreds of business owners who went digital with DukaanSite.
testimonials.t1: DukaanSite gave my kirana store an online presence I never thought possible. Customers now find me on Google!
testimonials.t2: The AI wrote better product descriptions than I ever could. My electronics shop website looks professional and premium.
testimonials.t3: As a wholesaler, I needed a B2B catalog online. DukaanSite delivered it in just one day. Absolutely worth it.
